user.title: Connect your spa
user.description: Enter your EW11A WiFi module IP address. You'll see the spa temperature and status in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Check that the IP address is correct and the EW11A module is powered on.

init.title: Advanced options
init.description: These settings fine-tune how data is read from the spa. Default values work well in most cases.

error.window_size_too_small: Value must be at least 3 for reliable reading
